purpose: summarize runtime behavior under increasing worker contention

worker_profiles.interpretation: baseline concurrency; correctness holds with low contention
moderate contention; stale writes increase but are rejected
high contention; queue delay and retries grow, but duplicate commits remain prevented

key_findings: duplicate commit rate remains 0.0% across worker contention profiles
retry growth increases with worker count
lease contention increases under higher concurrency
stale-worker rejection count rises under contention but remains a protected-path event
queue delay increases at 32 workers, suggesting batching/fairness tuning is needed under high contention
safe_claim: This artifact documents load-test style runtime contention behavior and expected signals; it should be interpreted as a benchmark/report artifact, not a production-scale load test.
